name: Ryuunosuke Chiba
description:
__Height::__ 172 cm (5’8”)
__School:__ Kunugigaoka Junior High School
__Class:__ 3-E
__Seat Number:__ 15

He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. Chiba is a serious and stoic boy. He's very calm and doesn't talk a lot. He is the best marksman among all of Class 3-E. He excels in spatial calculation and, as such, is unmatched in long distance shooting. His abilities have even earned him the praises of Lovro, a hitman dealer and a retired assassin.
